name: cpp-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Vitalii Kotivskyi — Laravel Nightwatch health auditing, plugin authoring guides, and more

plugins.name: nightwatch-health-audit
plugins.description: Laravel Nightwatch health auditing with automatic Linear issue creation. Pulls exceptions, failed jobs, commands, scheduled tasks from Nightwatch MCP, compiles prioritized bug reports, and creates Linear issues for untracked bugs.

plugins.name: plugin-writing-skill
plugins.description: Guide for creating Cowork / Claude Code plugins from scratch — covers plugin.json, .mcp.json, skills, hooks, agents, and marketplace structure.
